next_steps: Perform immunohistochemical staining on biopsy tissue (CD20, CD3, CD68, GFAP, Ki-67)
Request tissue cultures for aerobic/anaerobic bacteria, fungi, mycobacteria, and Nocardia
Perform EBER in situ hybridization on biopsy specimen to evaluate for EBV association
Consult Infectious Disease for optimization of empiric antimicrobial coverage for Listeria and Nocardia
Obtain serum EBV PCR and quantify peripheral lymphocyte subsets
Consider repeat advanced neuroimaging (MR perfusion or spectroscopy) to differentiate neoplasm from inflammatory processes
Evaluate for systemic occult infection or malignancy via whole-body PET/CT scan
